Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Restraining Other Proceedings
Off Calendar Oct-19-2010 Continued To Oct-28-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF WENDY HEMMING'S MOTION FOR ORDER RESTRAINING OTHER PROCEEDINGS. Appearances: Steven Hammond and Corey Bennett of Hammond Law (955.1915) for plaintiff and moving party; Marcus Merchasin (678.2700) and Steven Helfand (397.0007) for defendant and responding party. Discussed and the court granted defendant's request to continue the matter and set forth a briefing schedule. Motion is continued to October 28, 2010; opposition due by 4:00 pm October 21, 2010; reply due October 26, 2010 by 4:00 pm. Mr. Hammond to fax the motion to defendant's counsel. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
